applicability_notes: Official NETGEAR macOS TFTP article is generic in procedure text but its applies-to section lists R7000, so it is model-level for source indexing.
evidence_snippets: NETGEAR KB 000064624 describes using Apple macOS TFTP to upload firmware to a NETGEAR router and lists R7000 in the article's applies-to section.
collector_notes: This source closes the macOS workflow gap for R7000 source indexing, but profile generation still needs hardware and firmware scope review.
